subprograms.name: Generic_Float

documentation.description: Generic function to generate a floating point value in the range [0, 1)

subprograms.name: Generic_Integer
subprograms.code:
generic
   type I is range <>;
   type Rg (<>) is limited new Rng with private;
   pragma
     Compile_Time_Error
       (not (I'Size = 8
             or else I'Size = 16
             or else I'Size = 32
             or else I'Size = 64
             or else I'Size = 128),
        "unsupported integer size");
function Generic_Integer (R : in out Rg) return I

documentation.description:
Generic function to generate an integer value over the whole machine
range. Only supports sizes 8, 16, 32, 64 and 128.

subprograms.name: Next
subprograms.code: function Next (R : in out Rng) return U64

documentation.description: Update the generator state and output the next 64-bit value

subprograms.name: Next_Bytes
subprograms.code: procedure Next_Bytes (R : in out Rng; Buf : out Bytes)

documentation.description:
Update the generator state and fill the provided buffer with random
bytes
